posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I wanted to let you know that the community will be undergoing some maintenance at 7PM UTC/3PM EST on Friday June 14th. We are making some improvements to our community forum, which will result in around 20 minutes of the forum being in read only mode. Don’t worry, our forum will be back stronger and with new capabilities!
